_comment: Fixed task set for the model-routing baseline harness (E9-22). Do not edit casually: the taskSetHash committed in each baseline-<class>.json is derived from this file, and validate mode fails on drift until baselines are re-recorded (DEVMATE_EVAL_RECORD=1 node scripts/eval-model-routing.mjs).

tasks.description: What does the gate guard deny before impl-started?
Where is the session token budget threshold configured?
Add a --json flag to the view-trace summary output with tests.
Fix the off-by-one in trace line numbering and add a regression test.
Migrate every script to the unified token estimator across three personas and update all affected tests.
Split the orchestrator lane docs into per-lane protocol cards and regenerate every generated block.
